name: Starlight
description: Starlight — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Documentation.

seo.title: Starlight Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Starlight analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Starlight is a Developer Portals / API Management tool.
pros: Centralizes API governance, docs, and rate limiting
cons: Adds an extra network hop and operational layer
review.best_for: Enterprises exposing APIs to partners or public
